standard.label: 标准
standard.prompt_hint: Translation mode: STANDARD. Translate faithfully and fluently into the target language, preserving meaning, structure, glossary terms, and all non-text tokens.

precise.label: 精准
precise.prompt_hint: Translation mode: PRECISE. Translate accurately and faithfully, preserve the structure and tone of the source, apply glossary terms strictly, and do not paraphrase or embellish.

natural.label: 自然
natural.prompt_hint: Translation mode: NATURAL. Translate so it reads naturally and fluently in the target language while fully preserving the original meaning.

polish.label: 润色
polish.prompt_hint: Translation mode: POLISH. Produce polished, idiomatic, well-written target-language prose while preserving the original meaning; improve flow and word choice.

subtitle.label: 字幕精简
subtitle.prompt_hint: Translation mode: SUBTITLE. Translate concisely in a natural spoken style; keep each value short and easy to read at a glance, as a subtitle line, without dropping meaning.
